title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Khadim's

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Khadim's
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's:
Khadim's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
